Tip of the day
Quality outcome will help raise the chances for better quality items seen at the bottom of recipes in the crafting interface.

Modified platform shoes

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Namespaces

Other languages:

Modified platform shoes
Rarity:
Type: Loot
Slot: Feet
Value: 48
Search
Keyword: 		Crafting
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

Some adjustable shoes that allow setting different heights on a whim. Excellent for helping get all the previously out-of-reach objects on shelves.

The Modified platform shoes item is a loot item.

Requirement

  • At least Crafting lvl. 42.

Attributes

+2% Double rewards While doing Crafting.
-3 Steps required While doing Crafting.
+2% No materials consumed While doing Crafting.
+18 Quality outcome While doing Crafting.

Uses

Mysterious Merchant

Shop Name Payment
Mysterious Merchant 30

Sources

Chest Drops

Chest Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest)† 		Odds
Crafting chest 1 0.375% 1.492% ~1 in 67

†Note: Chests roll for loot multiple times.

Mysterious Merchant

Shop Name Price
Mysterious Merchant 120
